issues.sample: Stock fuel lines on the driver side of vehicle are having rubbing/clearance issues with the hood and are causing engine fires for the 2022+ Subaru BRZ/Toyota GR86 model vehicles.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Subaru Brz owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (50% of reports).
